label: Text block
description: A simple heading + paragraph block. Useful for announcements and short content.

settings.heading: Why PNEC exists
settings.body:
When emergency strikes, the first responders are the people on your block — not first responders. That's true everywhere, but especially in Poway, where wildfire risk, Santa Ana winds, and rural roads can put neighborhoods on their own for hours or days.

PNEC connects every household to a trained block coordinator so when the moment comes, you don't face it alone.

settings.heading: How it works
settings.body: Three simple steps. Find your block. Meet your coordinator. Build your 72-hour kit. We'll walk you through each.

settings.heading: 📢 Updated guide available
settings.body: The 2025 Poway Wildfire Preparedness Guide is now live with new evacuation routes, updated kit recommendations, and a fresh defensible-space checklist.
